message:
✨ HA-inspired restart UX + component marketplace (#825)

* ✨ Add HA-inspired restart UX: startup snackbar, graceful shutdown, version handshake

Inspired by Home Assistant's reconnection patterns:

- Add "Starting up..." blue snackbar while backend is in 'connecting' state
  (non-blocking — full UI renders underneath with skeleton cards)
- Clear stale kc_meta:* localStorage keys on mount to prevent "Refresh failed"
  badges from persisting across sessions
- Add graceful shutdown signaling: /health returns {"status":"shutting_down"}
  during server teardown so frontend can distinguish restart from crash
- Add Version var to backend (injected via ldflags), included in /health response
- Frontend parses /health JSON, tracks initial version, shows persistent
  "New version available — Reload" snackbar when version changes
- Add shuttingDown atomic flag to Server struct, set before service teardown

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add dashboard export/import API for marketplace foundation

Add portable dashboard export format (kc-dashboard-v1) with two new endpoints:

- GET /api/dashboards/:id/export — Returns self-contained JSON with dashboard
  layout and all cards in a portable format (no IDs, no user binding)
- POST /api/dashboards/import — Creates a new dashboard + cards from an
  export JSON blob, assigned to the current user

This is the backend foundation for the HACS-inspired component marketplace
where users can share and install dashboard configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add dashboard export/import UI buttons to floating action menu

Wire the export/import API endpoints into the dashboard UI:

- Add Export and Import buttons to the FloatingDashboardActions FAB menu
- Export downloads the current dashboard as a portable JSON file
- Import opens a file picker, reads JSON, and creates a new dashboard
- Both main Dashboard and CustomDashboard get export/import support
- Add exportDashboard and importDashboard methods to useDashboards hook
- Toast notifications for success/failure feedback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add community marketplace gallery page (B4)

Adds a new /marketplace route with a searchable, filterable gallery for
community dashboards and card presets. Features include:
- Registry fetched from GitHub with 1-hour localStorage cache
- Search by name/description and filter by tag
- One-click install via the dashboard import API
- Sidebar nav item in the secondary section (Store icon)
- Prefetched route chunk for instant navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
+import { api } from '../lib/api'
+
+const REGISTRY_URL = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console-marketplace/main/registry.json'
+const CACHE_KEY = 'kc-marketplace-registry'
+const CACHE_TTL_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000 // 1 hour
+
+export interface MarketplaceItem {
+  id: string
+  name: string
+  description: string
+  author: string
+  version: string
+  screenshot?: string
+  downloadUrl: string
+  tags: string[]
+  cardCount: number
+  type: 'dashboard' | 'card-preset' | 'theme'
+}
+
+interface MarketplaceRegistry {
+  version: string
+  updatedAt: string
+  items: MarketplaceItem[]
+}
+
+interface CachedRegistry {
+  data: MarketplaceRegistry
+  fetchedAt: number
+}
+
+export function useMarketplace() {
+  const [items, setItems] = useState<MarketplaceItem[]>([])
+  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)
+  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
+  const [selectedTag, setSelectedTag] = useState<string | null>(null)
+
+  const fetchRegistry = useCallback(async () => {
+    setIsLoading(true)
+    setError(null)
+
+    // Check localStorage cache
+    try {
+      const cached = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY)
+      if (cached) {
+        const parsed: CachedRegistry = JSON.parse(cached)
+        if (Date.now() - parsed.fetchedAt < CACHE_TTL_MS) {
+          setItems(parsed.data.items)
+          setIsLoading(false)
+          return
+        }
+      }
+    } catch {
+      // Cache read failed — continue to fetch
+    }
+
+    try {
+      const response = await fetch(REGISTRY_URL)
+      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Registry fetch failed: ${response.status}`)
+      const data: MarketplaceRegistry = await response.json()
+      setItems(data.items || [])
+
+      // Cache the result
+      try {
+        localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
+          data,
+          fetchedAt: Date.now(),
+        }))
+      } catch {
+        // Cache write failed — non-critical
+      }
+    } catch (err) {
+      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load marketplace')
+      setItems([])
+    } finally {
+      setIsLoading(false)
+    }
+  }, [])
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    fetchRegistry()
+  }, [fetchRegistry])
+
+  const installItem = useCallback(async (item: MarketplaceItem) => {
+    const response = await fetch(item.downloadUrl)
+    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Download failed: ${response.status}`)
+    const dashboardJson = await response.json()
+    const { data } = await api.post('/api/dashboards/import', dashboardJson)
+    return data
+  }, [])
+
+  // Collect all unique tags
+  const allTags = Array.from(new Set(items.flatMap(i => i.tags))).sort()
+
+  // Filter items
+  const filteredItems = items.filter(item => {
+    const matchesSearch = !searchQuery ||
+      item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+      item.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
+    const matchesTag = !selectedTag || item.tags.includes(selectedTag)
+    return matchesSearch && matchesTag
+  })
+
+  return {
+    items: filteredItems,
+    allItems: items,
+    allTags,
+    isLoading,
+    error,
+    searchQuery,
+    setSearchQuery,
+    selectedTag,
+    setSelectedTag,
+    installItem,
+    refresh: fetchRegistry,
+  }
+}
